String: Using advanced security systems, this augmentation will secure your loot pack on death for a limited time. Once the timer completes however, anyone will be able to access it.
Using advanced security systems, this augmentation will secure your loot pack on death for a limited time. Once the timer completes however, others will be able to hack it and then access it.
As the standard form of security, this augmentation will secure your loot pack on death for a limited time. Once the timer completes, others will be able to hack it and gain access.
Through meticulous adjustments, these nanomachines will augment your vision, giving you the ability to see in the dark, at the cost of making it more difficult to see during the day.
By modifying the structure of your leg muscles, these nanomachines will augment your jumping, giving you the ability to reach new heights.
Using an advanced crystaline structure, these nanomachines will enhance your bone strength, allowing you to fall from steeper heights and take less damage from doing so.
Through the use of advanced skeletal therapy, these nanomachines allow you to push off the ground harder when running, increasing your sprint speed.
By catching and changing the oscillations in the air, these nanomachines are able to nullify all of the sounds produced by your body while moving.
By increasing the processing power of your IFF module, these nanomachines enable you to interact with people and objects from greater distances.
